visual_description: In a dimly lit, cavernous hall with stone pillars and a grand staircase in the background, three young people are engaged in a tense conversation. On the left, a young man with dark hair and glasses, wearing a brown jacket, gestures with his hand as he speaks urgently to the man on the right. In the center, a young woman with long brown hair looks on with a concerned and worried expression. The man on the right, seen from the back, wears a dark, patterned sweater and listens intently. The camera is positioned in a medium shot, capturing the emotional exchange between the characters. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, and a watermark is visible in the top right corner. A young man speaks in a panicked and urgent tone, his voice filled with desperation and a sense of impending doom. He asks, "你看到卢娜了吗？" (Did you see Luna?). The camera angle shifts slightly, focusing more on the young man with glasses. He continues to speak with an intense and pleading look, his hand still extended.
